Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party David Easter
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'SMotion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party David Easter.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

Petitioner's unopposed "motion for final judgment as to interested party David Easter" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed. See scanned order for complete ruling.
